docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ALDER LANDSCAPE ARCHITECTURE (GLENN ROGERS, RLA) ON LOK, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ALDER LANDSCAPE ARCHITECTURE (GLENN ROGERS, RLA) IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GLENN ROGERS. DEFENDANT ON LOK, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FIONA MARSH. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE PETITIONER'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
